_comment: Machine-readable ground truth for weight-reading regression. Only lifter-CONFIRMED entries. scorable=true means the TOTAL working weight is confirmed and the scorer grades it. tolerance_kg = one plate/slot increment for that rig. Human doc: ground-truth.md. Scorer: scripts/kb/score_weights.py.

cases.notes: 2 x 2.5kg plates/dumbbell, NO handle added. Blind miss was 7kg (added handle).
Each end = 2kg outer + 1kg inner = 3kg/end. Blind miss wavered 8->6-8->8kg (called mixed plates uniform).
3 empty holes from top (13,21,29 open) -> pin in plate 4 = 37kg. EXACT required (painted stack). Blind miss x4: 45/53/61/69 (eyeballed knob column).
5 empty holes from top (13,21,29,37,45 open) -> pin in plate 6 = 53kg. EXACT required. Independently confirmed; count-holes method reproduces it.
Plate denom 2kg (4.4LB) lifter-confirmed 'spot on'; TOTAL (with bar) never cleanly confirmed -> not scored on total. Denomination read is a separate confirmed fact.
10kg PLATE MASS confirmed, but LEVER rig -> working resistance != mass (unknown ratio). Not scored as working weight. Plate mass recorded for reference only.
